title: Squibbin Hangout
description: A modpack for the Squibbin Squad Discord Server.
body:
This is an SMP modpack created for the Squibbin Squad private discord server, for use between a friend group. It contains an assortment of mods and is here simply for ease of access to an updated version of the modpack at all times.

Though I wouldn't necessarily suggest it, this modpack can be used by anyone, even if you aren't a part of the SMP this pack was designed for. This pack was designed with a wide variety of content and tweaks in min.

This pack was designed via the feedback of the Squibbin Squad discord server, and since we have a variety of computer specs, this pack also includes a whole bunch of performance enhancement mods, like Sodium, alongside a bunch of QOL changes, allowing you to change and modify most aspects of this modpack via the config, though since this pack has been configured for 7+ players, it may not be the best for the solo player experience.

If you have the friends for it however, this pack will provide a fun experience that has a wide variety of different content for many types of players, and the pack will be updated quite frequently, so every once in a while there should always be something new to explore.

This modpack also includes a set of config files, intended for the Squibbin Squad SMP Server.
The only real reason you'd want to install this pack is if you are inside of the private Squibbin Squad discord server, though this pack will function entirely on an internal server (a local world).
